scripts.install:all: cd services/orchestrator && npm install && cd ../fx-service && npm install && cd ../payout-simulator && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd services/orchestrator && npm run build && cd ../fx-service && npm run build && cd ../payout-simulator && npm run build
scripts.test:all: cd services/orchestrator && npm test && cd ../fx-service && npm test && cd ../payout-simulator && npm test
